title: Engine Subsystem Static Attributes
description: Static attributes of the piston engine, including power, torque, speed characteristics, etc.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference path, used for editor intelligent suggestions and validation

basic_durability.description: Subsystem basic durability, becomes paralyzed when reduced to 0, restores functionality when repaired to 30% durability.

pass_damage.description: Whether to pass damage to the subsystem holder. If true, damage received by the subsystem will be transferred to the sub-part.

limit_damage.description: Whether to limit damage transfer value to the subsystem's remaining durability. For example, 40 damage with 20 remaining durability will only transfer 20 damage to the holder.

hidden.description: Whether to hide the subsystem in HUD displays, commonly used for purely providing model part damage differentiation for non-functional subsystems

idle_rpm.description: Idle speed, in revolutions per minute (RPM).

idle_rpm_torque_ratio.description: Ratio of idle torque to maximum torque.

max_torque_rpm.description: Speed at which maximum torque is achieved, in revolutions per minute (RPM).

red_line_rpm.description: Redline speed, exceeding which may cause damage, in revolutions per minute (RPM).

red_line_torque_ratio.description: Ratio of torque at redline speed to maximum torque.

inertia.description: Engine system moment of inertia, in kilogram-square meters (kg·m²).

four_stroke.description: Is it a four-stroke, false then two-stroke, affecting engine sound effect.

cylinder.description: Cylinder count, affecting engine sound effect.

damping_factors.description: Engine resistance coefficients at various orders, constant term, first order term, second order term, ... increasing, in N·m/(rad/s)^n.

control_inputs.description: List of throttle input signal keys, from highest to lowest priority.

on_destroyed.description: Sound event when the subsystem is destroyed.

on_activate.description: Sound event when the subsystem is activated.

on_deactivate.description: Sound event when the subsystem is deactivated.

working_sounds.description: Manual working sound map. Keys are RPM strings (e.g. "800", "4500.0"), values are sound events. Uses auto synthesis when empty.

sounds.description: Basic sound configuration for the subsystem.
